name: James 'Jimmy' Hopkins
description:
✩ Jimmy couldn't believe it, sharing his room? This is directly unfair... Why, among all the male students, should he be the one to share his room?!

► Jimmy's last school year.

► Possible MLM

► I tried to make it as accurate as possible, but if there are some major errors, pls let me know in the comments :)
